name: Zerzuzan Dervish Style
description: While wielding two d6 weapons, one in each hand, your attacks gain the Blast quality when you are Close to 2 or more foes.

name: Bastian Dueling Style
description: While wielding a weapon in one hand and no shield or weapon in the other, your attacks ignore the Armor of creatures your size or smaller.

name: Ursine Breaker Style
description: While wielding a two handed weapon and wearing no gear that grants you Armor, your attacks ignore the Armor of creatures larger than you.

name: Canid Wall Style
description: If you have a shield equipped, when fighting next to an ally who also has a shield, you both gain +1 Armor.

name: Lapine Fury Style
description: You may wield two Hefty weapons, one in each hand.

name: Chiroptid Stalker Style
description: You may still make attacks with a ranged weapon if you start your turn Close to an opponent.
